name: Tyvar Kell
description:
"Finally, a worthy adversary."

Is it Tyvar time? I think it's Tyvar time.

Here comes Magic: The Gathering's resident Gigachad. No specific scenario, just you and him meeting during a feast... or open scenario because I love those.

Love Norse Mythology inspired realms? Well, you're in luck, 'cuz you're gonna love Kaldheim.

I'll be updating Oko, The Ringleader at some point soon with the new Lorwyn stuff as well as adding a new open scenario second greeting, so stay tuned for that.

User has no specific role, so be whatever! Enjoy~!

CW's ~ None :3c
